# terrible_community_general_hwc_vpc_port (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `subnet_id` (String) Specifies the ID of the subnet to which the port belongs.

### Optional

- `admin_state_up` (Boolean) Specifies the administrative state of the port.
- `allowed_address_pairs` (String) Specifies a set of zero or more allowed address pairs.
- `extra_dhcp_opts` (String) Specifies the extended option of DHCP.
- `ip_address` (String) Specifies the port IP address.
- `name` (String) Specifies the port name. The value can contain no more than 255 characters.
- `security_groups` (String) Specifies the ID of the security group.
- `state` (String) Whether the given object should exist in Huawei Cloud.
- `timeouts` (String) The timeouts for each operations.

### Read-Only

- `mac_address` (String) Specifies the port MAC address.
